required_preferences.fact: Replaces after-lunch walks with seated mindfulness meditation for mental clarity — avoids all weight-bearing activities while recovering from ankle sprain

supersedes.fact: Goes for a short walk after lunch for mental clarity — never walks in the evening

required_preferences.fact: Prioritizes responding to Etsy customer messages from new buyers within 4 hours, but allows regular inquiries and messages from returning customers to wait up to 24 hours due to high volume after going viral

supersedes.fact: Responds to Etsy customer messages within 2 hours during working hours — avoids letting replies linger overnight

required_preferences.fact: Preps breakfast for the family every morning before anyone wakes — never skips this even on weekends
Reviews weekly calendar every Sunday evening with spouse — never plans last-minute activities
Prepares and eats weekday family dinners without the spouse; switches to sending a family mealtime recap message and photo after the children are in bed
Participates in online maker community forums daily but never joins video chats; prefers written communication

persona: A stay-at-home parent running a handmade crafts shop on Etsy
